languages.original_text: "I... agh... Jae, about whom... ahem. I don't think stooping to transparently derogatory insinuations is worthy of the Lord Captain's retinue!"

languages.text: "Я... а... Джай, о ком же... ахем. Не думаю, что опускаться до прозрачных уничижительных намеков достойно свиты Лорд-капитана!"
"I... agh... Jae, about whom... ahem. I don't think stooping to transparently derogatory insinuations is worthy of the Lord Captain's retinue!"

"I... agh... Jae, about whom... ahem. I don't think stooping to transparently derogatory insinuations is worthy of the Lord Captain's retinue!"

languages.text: 「私… ああ… ジェイについて… あ、咳。卑劣な陰口を言うのは、船長の側近にふさわしくない！」
languages.original_text: "I... agh... Jae, about whom... ahem. I don't think stooping to transparently derogatory insinuations is worthy of the Lord Captain's retinue!"

traits.locale_text: 「私… ああ… ジェイについて… あ、咳。卑劣な陰口を言うのは、船長の側近にふさわしくない！」

languages.text: « Je... Argh... Jae, de qui... Hum. L'entourage {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneur-capitaine} ne devrait pas s'abaisser à proférer des insinuations à la désobligeance flagrante ! »
languages.original_text: "I... agh... Jae, about whom... ahem. I don't think stooping to transparently derogatory insinuations is worthy of the Lord Captain's retinue!"

traits.locale_text: « Je... Argh... Jae, de qui... Hum. L'entourage {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneur-capitaine} ne devrait pas s'abaisser à proférer des insinuations à la désobligeance flagrante ! »

languages.text: "Ich ... agh ... Jae, was das angeht ... ähm. Ich denke, offenkundig herabwürdigende Andeutungen sind der Entourage des Lord Captains nicht würdig!"
languages.original_text: "I... agh... Jae, about whom... ahem. I don't think stooping to transparently derogatory insinuations is worthy of the Lord Captain's retinue!"

traits.locale_text: "Ich ... agh ... Jae, was das angeht ... ähm. Ich denke, offenkundig herabwürdigende Andeutungen sind der Entourage des Lord Captains nicht würdig!"

languages.text: "Ben... Jae, kiminle... Öhöm. Şeffaf bir şekilde aşağılayıcı imalara tenezzül etmenin Lord Kaptan'ın maiyetine yakıştığını düşünmüyorum!"
languages.original_text: "I... agh... Jae, about whom... ahem. I don't think stooping to transparently derogatory insinuations is worthy of the Lord Captain's retinue!"

traits.locale_text: "Ben... Jae, kiminle... Öhöm. Şeffaf bir şekilde aşağılayıcı imalara tenezzül etmenin Lord Kaptan'ın maiyetine yakıştığını düşünmüyorum!"

languages.text: «Yo... agh... Jae, de quién... ejem. ¡No creo que rebajarse a comentarios despectivos sea propio del séquito {mf|del|de la} Lord Capitán!».
languages.original_text: "I... agh... Jae, about whom... ahem. I don't think stooping to transparently derogatory insinuations is worthy of the Lord Captain's retinue!"

traits.locale_text: «Yo... agh... Jae, de quién... ejem. ¡No creo que rebajarse a comentarios despectivos sea propio del séquito {mf|del|de la} Lord Capitán!».

languages.text: “我……呃……婕伊，关于她……咳咳。我认为，沦落到使用如此明显的恶意影射，实在有失舰长大人随行人员的身份！”
languages.original_text: "I... agh... Jae, about whom... ahem. I don't think stooping to transparently derogatory insinuations is worthy of the Lord Captain's retinue!"

traits.locale_text: “我……呃……婕伊，关于她……咳咳。我认为，沦落到使用如此明显的恶意影射，实在有失舰长大人随行人员的身份！”
